arts.ttl: Celtic vs Dundee United: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Celtic, currently sitting comfortably at the top of the Premiership table, host Dundee United, who are in 3rd place, at Parkhead on January 8th, 2025, at 19:45 GMT.This match promises to be a fascinat...

arts.ttl: Former Celt reckons Brendan Rodgers double down has 'made it worse' for player
arts.sum: A former Celtic player believes Brendan Rodgers' recent double down has made things worse for the player in question

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers shares why Celtic expect 'totally different' Dundee Utd clash following Tannadice draw
arts.sum: Coming into the clash in a positive mindset, the Bhoys swept aside St Mirren last weekend to extend their lead at the top of the Scottish Premiership following Rangers’ draw at Hibernian. The same couldn’t be said in the last meeting between the sides at Tannadice, where an injury-ravaged Celtic drew a blank at Dundee United before Christmas.

arts.ttl: Celtic squad predicted as Greg Taylor to answer 'disrespect' with double century while Rodgers rotation game begins
arts.sum: The Hoops are facing eight games in the next 25 days and Brendan Rodgers will likely need to utilise his squad

arts.ttl: Despite Celtic return rumours, Jota set to swap Rennes for big European club
arts.sum: It looks like former Celtic winger Jota could be on the move again this transfer window, with one big European club moving to the front of the queue for his signature

arts.ttl: Postecoglou repeats familiar Celtic mantra while issuing clear Liverpool directive
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham face Liverpool in the EFL Cup, and the former Celtic manager issued a familiar message ahead of the semi-final encounter

arts.ttl: 'Proven winner'... Club CEO 'excited' to welcome former Celtic boss to new role in MLS
arts.sum: Former Celtic boss Ronny Deila speaks as Head Coach of Atlanta United Celtic fans will remember, of course, that Deila enjoyed success in the MLS before as manager of New York City where he won the MLS Eastern Conference.

arts.ttl: Big wage Greg Taylor 'wants' for new deal and what Kieran Tierney can expect to earn upon Celtic return
arts.sum: Truthfully, Celtic need a swift solution to Taylor’s future before his contract ends. Greg Taylor’s uncertain Celtic future has become a major talking point among supporters as he enters the final few months of his deal no closer to an agreement being found .

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist defends Celtic midfielder after Alan Brazil's worry and jibe at Rangers
arts.sum: Either way, this is what Alan Brazil and Ally McCoist had to say about Celtic-Rangers, including their thoughts on Callum McGregor . Alan Brazil mocks Ally McCoist and Rangers for falling further behind Celtic

arts.ttl: Alan Brazil worried by missing Celtic ingredient as Kieran Tierney Arsenal 'disappointment' expressed
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers' men 13 clear in the league and have bagged a cup but that hasn't stopping Brazil having concerns
